og.title: The Habit (3× 250 ml) | AmberNord
og.description: The 30-day ritual for sustainable focus and cellular regeneration.

gallery.mainAlt: The Habit — 3× 250 ml sea buckthorn elixir

info.title: The Habit
info.subtitleSpan: Real energy instead of artificial kicks.
info.lead: Conventional energy drinks cost you on average 3 francs per can – and pay you back only with fatigue and dehydration. With «The Habit», you invest in a completely different league: a highly concentrated essence that needs no synthetic caffeine.
info.advantageBody: Our exclusive Zelt Selection uses the rare Omega-7 fatty acid (up to 42% concentration), 18 essential amino acids and over 190 bioactive compounds to regenerate your cells from within. It is not a short-term rush, but a sustainable foundation for your focus and immune system.
info.scienceItem1: 3× 250 ml of purest, cold-pressed organic essence (Zelt Selection).
info.scienceItem2: 30 days of full support for focus and regeneration.
info.scienceItem3: Yields up to 9 litres of vitalising premium drink.
info.shippingText: Free premium shipping within Switzerland. Direct shipping from our logistics centre in Aarau.
